scripts.dev: node scripts/dev-build-if-needed.mjs && concurrently -n server,client -k "cross-env FORCE_COLOR=1 npm run server" "sleep 2 && vite"
scripts.dev:debug: node scripts/dev-build-if-needed.mjs && concurrently -n server,client -k "cross-env FORCE_COLOR=1 npm run server:debug" "sleep 2 && vite"
scripts.dev:full-build: yarn build:packages:dev && concurrently -n server,client -k "cross-env FORCE_COLOR=1 npm run server" "sleep 2 && vite"
scripts.lint: yarn dumpi18n && eslint src server test e2e e2e-live packages --cache --cache-location node_modules/.cache/eslint/
scripts.typecheck: yarn typecheck:vue && yarn typecheck:server && yarn typecheck:test && yarn typecheck:e2e && yarn typecheck:e2e-live && yarn typecheck:packages
scripts.build:packages:dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "yarn workspace @mulmobridge/protocol run build" "yarn workspace @receptron/task-scheduler run build" && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "yarn workspace @mulmobridge/client run build" "yarn workspace @mulmobridge/chat-service run build" && node scripts/build-workspaces.mjs packages/plugins @mulmoclaude --name-suffix=-plugin
scripts.build:packages: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "yarn workspace @mulmobridge/protocol run build" "yarn workspace @receptron/task-scheduler run build" && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "yarn workspace @mulmobridge/client run build" "yarn workspace @mulmobridge/chat-service run build" "yarn workspace @mulmobridge/mock-server run build" && node scripts/build-workspaces.mjs packages/bridges @mulmobridge && node scripts/build-workspaces.mjs packages/plugins @mulmoclaude --name-suffix=-plugin
scripts.build: yarn build:packages && yarn build:hooks && vite build
scripts.test:e2e:live:media: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=media playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts media.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:wiki: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=wiki playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts wiki.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:wiki-nav: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=wiki-nav playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts wiki-nav.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:session: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=session playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts session.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:roles: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=roles playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts roles.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:mulmo-script-edit: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=mulmo-script-edit playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts mulmo-script-edit.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:ui: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=ui playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts ui.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:skills: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=skills playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts skills.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:settings: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=settings playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts settings.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:docker: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=docker playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts docker.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:fresh-boot: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=fresh-boot playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts fresh-boot.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:happy-tour: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=happy-tour playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts happy-tour.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:plugin-dispatch: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=plugin-dispatch playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts plugin-dispatch.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:journey-todo: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=journey-todo playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts journey-todo.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:journey-llm: yarn ensure:playwright-browsers && cross-env E2E_LIVE_REPORT_SUBDIR=journey-llm playwright test --config e2e-live/playwright.config.ts journey-llm.spec.ts
scripts.sandbox:login: security find-generic-password -s 'Claude Code-credentials' -w > ~/.claude/.credentials.json && echo 'Credentials exported to ~/.claude/.credentials.json'
